title: కాలములు — Tenses
description: Telugu has three primary tenses — present, past, and future — with continuous and perfect aspects.

items.heading: Present Tense — వర్తమాన కాలం
items.explanation: Used for actions happening now or regularly.

items.heading: Present Continuous — జరుగుతున్న వర్తమాన కాలం
items.explanation: Used for actions that are happening right now.
examples: ఆమె వంట చేస్తున్నది — She is cooking.

items.heading: Past Tense — భూత కాలం
items.explanation: Used for actions that are completed in the past.

items.heading: Past Continuous — జరుగుతున్న భూత కాలం
items.explanation: Used for actions that were ongoing in the past.

items.heading: Future Tense — భవిష్యత్ కాలం
items.explanation: Used for actions that will happen in the future.
